questions.name: Comparch - x86: Zeroing Optimization
questions.questiontext: Evaluate the three given methods for setting the EAX register to 0. Which of them is the most efficient in terms of opcode size and execution speed on a modern processor?

questions.name: Comparch - x86: Loop Optimization and Flags
questions.questiontext: Analyze the given loop fragment. Evaluate whether this code is correct and reliable. What would happen if the variable ECX were initially 0? Suggest a modification that would ensure program stability in unexpected cases.
questions.code:
loop_start:
    ; ... perform actions ...
    DEC ECX
    JNZ loop_start
